# As a driven entrepreneur and a seasoned professional with a robustÉ*Created: Friday, January 19, 2024 at 11:14:59?AM*<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px">As a driven entrepreneur and a seasoned professional with a robust track record in startups and small business development, I have accrued over a decade of rich, multi-faceted experience. My professional path has been characterized by an unwavering commitment to strategic marketing and the development of innovative business strategies that transform visionary concepts into tangible value.</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px">In my role as the Founder of Basin &amp Associates, I have galvanized growth for family-owned businesses, steering them through the complexities of the modern marketplace to achieve sustainable success. My dedication to the advancement of small businesses and startups has been evidenced by my proactive efforts to craft resonant brand narratives.</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px">With a strategist's mindset, I have successfully launched pioneering products and services, consistently securing market adoption and consumer acclaim. My passion extends beyond business operations to mentoring emerging entrepreneurs, guiding them through the intricacies of business inception and growth.</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px">As I step into the mentorship role within the BEACH program, I bring a reservoir of practical insights and a deep understanding of the challenges unique to small businesses and startups. My goal is to impart the wisdom gleaned from my experiences, supporting the next generation of innovators as they navigate the currents of the business landscape.</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 23px"><h1>Become a BEACH Mentor</h1></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">Mentors are organized to lead and provide information and resources to cross disciplinary teams.Ę A team consists of 2 law students and 2 undergraduate &amp graduate students. This team experience involves collaborative thinking and brainstorming towards solving a client's business and legal challenges.</span></div>
<div><u><span style="font-size: 16px">More Information for Mentors</span></u><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><h2>BEACH Mentors</h2></div>
<div>Ciocca Center's BEACH program is an opportunity for experienced professionals interested in consulting or advising, to mentor cross-disciplinary student teams and guide them with small businesses and startup clients through client discovery meetings, research, analysis to final presentations.</div>
<div>Mentors understand the importance of the entrepreneurial mindset, and the value of collaboration and teamwork to solve business and legal pain points. The expectation is to recommend practical and student driven next steps that lead to an ideal client solution.</div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><h2>Application Is Open for Fall 2023 Mentors in Business of Law</h2></div>
<div>Interdisciplinary teams of 6 made up of 2 law students, 2 undergraduate and graduate students, 1 law mentor and 1 business mentor who meet in person and/or virtually to research, review and provide information and resources to clients that address their business and legal challenges.</div>
<div>Each team works with four clients per BEACH session. BEACH's 10 week sessions run in the Fall (October-November) and in the Spring (March-April).</div>
<div><u>Apply to be a Mentor</u><b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>&quotWhat a fantastic group of students with different expertise.&quot</div>
<div>&quotI'm very impressed with the students' overall abilities to work together on the research then provide insightful presentations for each of the clients.&quot</div>
<div>&quotIt was a great experience to expose business concepts to law students and law concepts to business students! Brilliant.&quot</div>
